scripts.cleanup: bun run clean && rm -rf node_modules bun.lock*
scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build index.ts --compile --outfile dist/kb && bun run clean:build
scripts.build:prod: bun run clean && bun build index.ts --minify --sourcemap --no-compile-autoload-dotenv --no-compile-autoload-bunfig --compile --outfile dist/kb && bun run clean:build
scripts.test:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/tests && bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run test -- --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=tmp/reports/tests/junit.xml'
scripts.lint:biome:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/linters && bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run lint:biome -- --reporter=github --colors=off'
scripts.lint:knip:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/linters && bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run lint:knip 2>&1 | tee tmp/reports/linters/knip.txt'
scripts.lint:jscpd:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/linters && bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run lint:jscpd -- --reporters json --output tmp/reports/linters/jscpd'
scripts.lint:depcruise:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/linters && bash -o pipefail -c 'bun run lint:depcruise -- --output-type json | tee tmp/reports/linters/depcruise.json'
scripts.lint:hadolint:ci: mkdir -p tmp/reports/linters && bash -o pipefail -c 'mise exec -- hadolint --config .hadolint.yaml Dockerfile 2>&1 | tee tmp/reports/linters/hadolint.txt'
scripts.lint: e=0; bun run typecheck || e=1; bun run lint:biome || e=1; bun run lint:knip || e=1; bun run lint:jscpd || e=1; bun run lint:depcruise || e=1; bun run lint:hadolint || e=1; exit $e
scripts.lint:fix: e=0; bun run lint:biome:fix || e=1; bun run lint:knip:fix || e=1; exit $e
